response.original_title: The Revenge of the 2 Twinks in 1 War
response.overview: After the climax of the second World War, Tzakas finds himself lost once again in the heat of battle in Stalingrad. With tensions rising between the two parties a new German sergeant has become a real threat. With sgt. Smitheropoulos and a new ally by his side, Tzakas needs to bring peace back to the world.
response.title: The Revenge of the 2 Twinks in 1 War
